speaker: speaker1
text: This is the Bell Captain's Desk . May I help you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , I've been waiting for my bags to be sent up for the last half hour . Where are they ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I'm very sorry to hear that . May I have your name and room number , please ?

speaker: speaker1
text: And how many pieces did you have ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Two suitcases and a handbag . The suitcases are blue and the shoulder bag is red .

speaker: speaker1
text: Is there a name tag attached to them ?

speaker: speaker1
text: We're very sorry for the delay . I'll check immediately and call you back .
